title: Pull-down on chat header reveals search
design_brief: Pull down on a chat thread reveals a search bar above. Reference: iOS Mail's pull-to-search.
mobile_reasoning: Scroll handler tracks negative offset (overscroll). Search bar height interpolated from offset.

title: Sheet with horizontal swipe between detail pages
design_brief: Bottom sheet showing item detail; swipe horizontally to next/prev item without dismissing sheet. Reference: Airbnb listing detail.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Dismiss + open new sheet per item
mobile_reasoning: Sheet body uses horizontal PagerView or FlashList horizontal with paging.

title: FlashList with section sticky header sliding under
design_brief: Section headers slide under each other as user scrolls. Reference: Apple Music library, Contacts.
mobile_reasoning: FlashList stickyHeaderIndices handles the slide-under natively.
solution: // Already covered in rn-024 via stickyHeaderIndices prop\nimport {FlashList} from '@shopify/flash-list';\nexport function StickyList<T>(props: any) { return <FlashList {...props} stickyHeaderIndices={props.headerIndices}/>; }

title: OTP autofill from clipboard prompt
design_brief: On iOS, when user copies an OTP code from another app, a suggestion appears above the keyboard. Already covered for SMS in rn-004; this is the clipboard variant.
mobile_reasoning: iOS textContentType='oneTimeCode' enables clipboard-based OTP suggestion automatically.
interaction_details: iOS: clipboard OTP suggested above keyboard

title: Conditional initial route based on auth state
design_brief: App routes to /auth if unauthenticated, /home if authenticated, /onboarding if first launch. Reference: every app with auth.
mobile_reasoning: Splash kept visible until auth state determined; then router.replace.

title: Counter with rolling digit reels
design_brief: A counter where each digit rolls vertically like a slot machine on change. Reference: Robinhood balance, expense trackers.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: All digits roll together (should be per-digit)
mobile_reasoning: Per-digit View with translateY animating between digit positions.
interaction_details: Each digit rolls to new value

title: Glyph-style logo animation
design_brief: App logo morphs from outline to filled on launch. Reference: app launch animations from Cron, Linear.
mobile_reasoning: Skia Path with stroke + animated fill.

title: QR code scanner with viewfinder frame
design_brief: Camera-based QR scanner with a square viewfinder. Reference: Cash App QR, iOS Camera QR.
mobile_reasoning: VisionCamera scanner mode + overlay viewfinder. expo-camera also supports QR.
accessibility_considerations: accessibilityLabel='QR scanner, point camera at code'.

title: Address autocomplete with map preview
design_brief: Type address → suggestions → map preview of selected. Reference: Uber pickup address, Lyft destination.
mobile_reasoning: Use Google Places or Apple's MKLocalSearch. Suggestions in dropdown; selecting one updates a map preview component.

title: Sankey-style flow diagram (small mobile-suitable)
design_brief: Show flow between categories with weighted ribbons. Mobile version: simplified to 3-5 nodes.
mobile_reasoning: Skia paths drawn with bezier curves. Tap a ribbon to highlight.

title: Pull-down to refresh: per-platform feel
design_brief: iOS uses elastic bounce; Android uses Material indicator that floats. Reference: covered in rn-080 but reinforced here.
mobile_reasoning: RefreshControl handles platform differences.
solution: // See rn-080\nimport {RefreshControl} from 'react-native';\nexport function StandardRefresh({refreshing, onRefresh}: {refreshing:boolean; onRefresh:()=>void}) { return <RefreshControl refreshing={refreshing} onRefresh={onRefresh}/>; }

title: Custom hint for swipe-to-action rows
design_brief: Swipeable rows need accessibilityActions so VoiceOver users have an alternative to the gesture.
mobile_reasoning: accessibilityActions={[{name:'delete', label:'Delete'}, ...]}. onAccessibilityAction routes.
interaction_details: VoiceOver rotor shows Archive and Delete
what_makes_this_native: 1) Equivalent UX for sighted vs assistive.

title: Hand-drawn UI: jittery strokes via Skia
design_brief: All borders look hand-drawn with slight jitter. Reference: GoodNotes, Procreate UI.
mobile_reasoning: Skia paths with random jitter on stroke. Pre-compute on mount so jitter is stable per render.

title: FlashList masonry tuning for image-heavy feed
design_brief: Tuning MasonryFlashList for thousands of mixed-size image cards.
mobile_reasoning: Provide exact size hints. tracksViewChanges off after mount.
solution: // See rn-033 + overrideItemLayout providing exact heights for each item

title: Email field with autocomplete from system
design_brief: Email input that uses system saved emails as suggestions.
mobile_reasoning: textContentType='emailAddress' + autoComplete='email' triggers system saved.

title: Hide tab bar but allow swipe to reveal
design_brief: In immersive mode (e.g., reading), tab bar auto-hides. Swipe up from bottom reveals.
mobile_reasoning: Tab bar translateY shared value. Bottom-edge swipe gesture triggers reveal.
solution: // Pattern: combine AutoHideTabBar from rn-075 with EdgePullWrapper from rn-060\nexport {AutoHideTabBarProvider} from './AutoHideTabBar';\nimport React from 'react';

title: Page-curl transition between articles
design_brief: Article reader where swiping turns the page with a curl effect. Reference: iBooks classic page turn.
mobile_reasoning: Skia draws the page as a deformed surface. Swipe drives the curl angle.

title: Image annotation: draw on photo
design_brief: Mark up a photo with pen tool. Reference: iOS Markup, Notability.
mobile_reasoning: Skia Canvas with photo + draw strokes. Touch path becomes Skia Path.

title: Map clustering with custom cluster sizes
design_brief: Custom-sized cluster pins based on count.
mobile_reasoning: Already in rn-012 — count drives pin size.

title: Speedometer-style gauge
design_brief: Half-circle gauge with needle. Reference: car apps, fitness apps.
mobile_reasoning: Skia arc for gauge + needle line.
interaction_details: Needle swings to value with spring

title: Soft pastel kawaii: rounded everything, gentle pinks
design_brief: A journaling/diary app aesthetic: soft pastels, rounded everything (16+ radius), kawaii vibes. Reference: Japanese kawaii apps, Day One soft theme.
mobile_reasoning: Pastel palette + generous radius + soft shadows.

stylesheet_strategy.constants: const KW = {bg:'#FFF5F7', card:'#FFFFFF', text:'#5D4E5D', accent:'#FFB6C1', radius:20};

what_makes_this_native: 1) Cohesive aesthetic. 2) Pink-shadow color subtle but distinct.

title: Hermes garbage collection tuning hints
design_brief: Patterns to ease GC pressure: pool objects, avoid unnecessary array allocations in tight loops, use TypedArrays for numeric data.
mobile_reasoning: Hermes GC is fast but allocations still cost. Reusing objects beats allocating.

title: Drag-and-drop between two list columns
design_brief: Kanban-style: drag a card from 'To do' column to 'Done'. Reference: Trello mobile, Linear board.
mobile_reasoning: Cards in source column. Long-press picks up. Pan moves across columns. Drop detected via card position relative to column rects.

title: Sheet with header search that filters list below
design_brief: Bottom sheet with sticky header search bar filtering the list inside.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Search that doesn't stick on scroll
Re-render whole list on every char
mobile_reasoning: Search bar above FlashList; filter via useDeferredValue.

title: FlashList with cell separators that fade on scroll
design_brief: Separators fade in/out at top/bottom edges of viewport for visual polish.
mobile_reasoning: Mask gradient at top/bottom via expo-linear-gradient overlay.

title: Country / region picker with search
design_brief: Picker for country selection with searchable list and flag display.
mobile_reasoning: Bottom sheet with searchable FlashList. Flags via emoji (iOS) or text fallback (Android).

title: Deeply nested stack: avoid 'forgot the back button' problem
design_brief: In deep stacks, provide breadcrumbs OR 'jump to root' shortcut.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: No way to navigate up multiple levels
mobile_reasoning: Long-press back button shows breadcrumb popover. Or always-visible 'X' close button at top-right.

title: Like-count animation when count changes
design_brief: Like count updates with a +1 floating bubble that drifts up and fades. Reference: Instagram like reactions.
mobile_reasoning: Render a floating Text positioned over the count; animate translateY + opacity.

title: Dynamic blob shape morphing
design_brief: An organic blob shape that morphs subtly. Reference: TikTok 'wow' moments, brand splash screens.
mobile_reasoning: Skia path with bezier points whose offsets oscillate via shared values.

title: Live photo capture (iOS) with motion
design_brief: On iOS, capture Live Photos including ~1.5s motion before/after shutter. Reference: iOS Camera Live Photo mode.
mobile_reasoning: VisionCamera supports Live Photos on iOS via takePhoto with enableLivePhoto.
